ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "pain_level" INTEGER /* Self-reported pain level on a scale */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "IQ" INTEGER /* IQ score of the participant */,
  "household_income" INTEGER /* Annual household income in USD */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress assessment */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "STAI_trait" INTEGER /* Score from the State-Trait Anxiety Inventory (STAI) trait scale */,
  "STAI_state" INTEGER /* Score from the State-Trait Anxiety Inventory (STAI) state scale */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pain_categories" (
  "pain_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pain category */,
  "pain_level" INTEGER /* Associated pain level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pain category */,
  "pain_type" TEXT /* Type of pain (e.g., acute, chronic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pain_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cortisol_levels" (
  "cortisol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cortisol measurement */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "cortisol_serum" REAL /* Cortisol level in serum */,
  "cortisol_saliva" REAL /* Cortisol level in saliva */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cortisol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cortisol_levels_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mindfulness_scores" (
  "mindfulness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mindfulness score */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "mindfulness_score" REAL /* Mindfulness score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mindfulness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mindfulness_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant whose data is accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant involved in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user for the study */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "data_modified" TEXT /* Description of the data modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
